'''鈭歯g-p-d''' ('''kangapad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:holster|holster]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:holster|holster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kangapad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingapad|thingapad]] || [[word:jingapad|jingapad]] || [[word:shingapad|shingapad]] || [[word:kingapad|kingapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungapad|thuthungapad]] || [[word:jujungapad|jujungapad]] || [[word:shushungapad|shushungapad]] || [[word:kukungapad|kukungapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungapad|thungapad]] || [[word:jungapad|jungapad]] || [[word:shungapad|shungapad]] || [[word:kungapad|kungapad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungapad|thungapad]] || [[word:jungapad|jungapad]] || [[word:shungapad|shungapad]] || [[word:kungapad|kungapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengapad|thengapad]] || [[word:jengapad|jengapad]] || [[word:shengapad|shengapad]] || [[word:kengapad|kengapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongapad|thothongapad]] || [[word:jojongapad|jojongapad]] || [[word:shoshongapad|shoshongapad]] || [[word:kokongapad|kokongapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongapad|thongapad]] || [[word:jongapad|jongapad]] || [[word:shongapad|shongapad]] || [[word:kongapad|kongapad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongapad|thongapad]] || [[word:jongapad|jongapad]] || [[word:shongapad|shongapad]] || [[word:kongapad|kongapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngapad|th忙ngapad]] || [[word:j忙ngapad|j忙ngapad]] || [[word:sh忙ngapad|sh忙ngapad]] || [[word:k忙ngapad|k忙ngapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangapad|thathangapad]] || [[word:jajangapad|jajangapad]] || [[word:shashangapad|shashangapad]] || [[word:kakangapad|kakangapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangapad|thangapad]] || [[word:jangapad|jangapad]] || [[word:shangapad|shangapad]] || [[word:kangapad|kangapad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangapad|thangapad]] || [[word:jangapad|jangapad]] || [[word:shangapad|shangapad]] || [[word:kangapad|kangapad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangapad|shangapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangapad|goshangapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangapad|gokishangapad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangapadn眉|shangapadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadnkn眉|goshangapadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadn眉|gokishangapadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangapadsh毛|shangapadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangapadnksh毛|goshangapadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangapadsh毛|gokishangapadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadro|shangapadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadnkro|goshangapadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadro|gokishangapadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadmu|shangapadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadnkmu|goshangapadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadmu|gokishangapadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangapadsher|shangapadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangapadnksher|goshangapadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangapadsher|gokishangapadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangapadng|shangapadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangapadnkng|goshangapadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangapadng|gokishangapadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangapadya|shangapadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangapadnkya|goshangapadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangapadya|gokishangapadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangapadyam|shangapadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangapadnkyam|goshangapadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangapadyam|gokishangapadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapadn眉sh毛|shangapadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapadnkn眉sh毛|goshangapadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapadn眉sh毛|gokishangapadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadn眉ro|shangapadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadnkn眉ro|goshangapadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadn眉ro|gokishangapadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadn眉mu|shangapadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadnkn眉mu|goshangapadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadn眉mu|gokishangapadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapadsh毛n眉|shangapadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadnksh毛n眉|goshangapadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadsh毛n眉|gokishangapadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadsh毛ro|shangapadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadnksh毛ro|goshangapadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadsh毛ro|gokishangapadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadsh毛mu|shangapadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadnksh毛mu|goshangapadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadsh毛mu|gokishangapadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapadron眉|shangapadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadnkron眉|goshangapadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadron眉|gokishangapadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapadrosh毛|shangapadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapadnkrosh毛|goshangapadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapadrosh毛|gokishangapadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadromu|shangapadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadnkromu|goshangapadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadromu|gokishangapadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapadmun眉|shangapadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadnkmun眉|goshangapadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadmun眉|gokishangapadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapadmush毛|shangapadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapadnkmush毛|goshangapadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapadmush毛|gokishangapadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadmuro|shangapadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadnkmuro|goshangapadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadmuro|gokishangapadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
